metadata.description: Claude Code skills for reproducible scientific data analysis and notebook composition.

plugins.name: aliby-pipeline
plugins.description: Run the aliby image analysis pipeline with nahual cellpose/trackastra GPU servers for segmentation, tracking, and feature extraction.

plugins.name: compose-notebook
plugins.description: Compose marimo notebooks from the aliby catalog to build microscopy image analysis pipelines (segmentation, feature extraction, deep learning embeddings).

plugins.name: org-duckdb-analysis
plugins.description: Create Org Mode literate notebooks that use DuckDB SQL queries via org-babel to explore and analyze tabular data (CSV, Parquet) inside Emacs.
